description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to master, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has three jobs: check, gpu, and windows-gpu. The check job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, macos-latest, and windows-latest, and performs various R package checks and tests. The gpu and windows-gpu jobs run on self-hosted Linux and Windows environments, respectively, and perform Docker-based checks and tests with different CUDA versions.
